subcodes.first_line: The Wronged One beareth witness even as God hath borne witness in the Kingdom of Utterance that there is none other God but Him, the Mighty, the Bestower. O [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد المظلوم بما شهد الله فی ملکوت البیان انه لا اله الا هو العزیز المنان یا
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @God's oneness [ahadiyyih and wahidiyyih], @proclamation to people of the Bayan, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
